channel.title: oscillator on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in oscillator on SoundsBrown
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: 4046 VCO
item.description: VCO based on a 4046 IC. https://hackaday.com/2015/08/07/logic-noise-4046-voltage-controlled-oscillator-part-one/ TODO: Pitch is wildly unstable, buffer the CV input? See https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3ZLcbhSE1pc

item.title: 40106 Hex Oscillator
item.description: 6 square wave oscillators with frequency knobs and sync inputs. Very common circuit based on 40106 IC. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DtUCzzjHhgM

item.title: LFO
item.description: Arduino-based digital LFO. Rate from 0.01 Hz to 37 Hz using a non-linear scale. Six waveforms: saw, ramp, triangle, square, sine and value noise (Perlin-esque). PWM control for all waveforms. Unipolar output (0V - 5V) through an MCP4725 DAC (I2C interface, 12 bit resolution). Optional status display on an I2C OLED. Output is buffered using a TL08x References: https://www.sparkfun.com/products/12918 https://github.com/olikraus/U8g2_Arduino
